entity_accounting.purpose: Explains the relationship between table counts, entity counts, and field coverage counts across canonical artifacts.

frontend_entities.description: Frontend entity registrations. 628 table-backed + 5 virtual/composite entities.

readiness.description: 97 blocked = canonical ISA-95 tables from migrations 072-078 not yet configured for frontend. 3 partial = tables with incomplete field definitions.

field_coverage.derivation: 628 schema tables - 97 blocked - 3 partial = 528 tables with complete field definitions

why_counts_differ.633_vs_628: 5 virtual/composite entities have no physical table but appear in frontend catalog
why_counts_differ.528_vs_628: 100 tables (97 blocked + 3 partial) lack field definitions and endpoint catalog entries
why_counts_differ.533_vs_628: 533 ready entities = 528 ready table-backed + 5 virtual entities
why_counts_differ.conclusion: These are NOT bugs. They reflect the progressive onboarding of canonical ISA-95 tables into the frontend entity system.
